summary: Removed `newPdokLocationSearchPromotedCmd` from rootCmd.AddCommand; the function remains so dead-code checks pass but the command is no longer in the Cobra tree.
reason: The raw `/search` endpoint requires `<col>[version]=1` per-collection opt-in that the generic generated path can't encode. Users get the friendly `features search` wrapper instead. The unused AddCommand stays commented in root.go to document why it was removed.
validated_outcome: `pdok-location-pp-cli --help` no longer lists `pdok-location-search`; `features search` works correctly.
